name: 3-Hump Lacooda
text: If there are 3 face-up "3-Hump Lacooda" cards on your side of the field, Tribute 2 of them to draw 3 cards.

name: 4-Starred Ladybug of Doom
text: FLIP: Destroy all Level 4 monsters your opponent controls.

name: 7 Colored Fish
text: A rare rainbow fish that has never been caught by mortal man.

name: 8-Claws Scorpion
text: Once per turn, you can flip this card into face-down Defense Position. When this card attacks an opponent's face-down Defense Position monster, this card's ATK becomes 2400 during damage calculation only.

name: A Bao A Qu, the Lightless Shadow
text: 2+ monsters, including a Fiend monsterDuring the Main Phase (Quick Effect): You can discard 1 card, then activate 1 of these effects;●Destroy 1 card on the field.●Banish this card (until the End Phase), and if you do, Special Summon 1 LIGHT or DARK monster from your GY.During your Standby Phase: You can draw cards equal to the number of different Monster Types in your GY, then place cards from your hand on the bottom of the Deck in any order, equal to the number of cards you drew. You can only use each effect of "A Bao A Qu, the Lightless Shadow" once per turn.
